behaviors.description: `=SUM(A1:A10)` evaluates to the correct sum for A1..A10.
behaviors.justification: Seam map: module/interface seam (formula parser -> range resolver -> function library -> evaluator). MOCK-MISS: this failure can appear at handoff between range resolution and SUM aggregation, not just inside one pure function. INTEGRATION-BRAKE: no real OS/network/subprocess required, no AI/ML output, no multi-step agent pipeline. REJECTION-GATE: System rejected because behavior text only requires correct arithmetic/range resolution, not OS-dependent behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Create an in-process workbook with numeric values in A1..A10, evaluate `=SUM(A1:A10)` through the engine entrypoint, and assert computed value equals expected sum.

behaviors.description: Cascaded references (e.g., A cell `=B1+1`, B1=`=A1*2`) produce the correct final value.
behaviors.justification: Seam map: module/interface seam (dependency resolution + evaluator across cells). Failure mode is cross-cell propagation and expression chaining. INTEGRATION-BRAKE: no real infra, no AI/ML, no multi-agentic chain. REJECTION-GATE: System rejected because behavior text is about calculation correctness across internal modules, not external environment effects.
behaviors.test_description: Set up cells with a base value and chained formulas across cells, evaluate target cell, and assert final cascaded result is correct.

behaviors.description: Circular dependency (A1->B1, B1->A1) is detected and returns circular reference error.
behaviors.justification: Seam map: module/interface seam (graph construction/traversal + evaluator error propagation). Real failure appears when dependency modules interact during evaluation. INTEGRATION-BRAKE: no OS/network/subprocess, no AI/ML, no multi-step agentic flow. REJECTION-GATE: System rejected because loop detection is internal graph logic, not environment behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Define mutual references between two cells, trigger evaluation, and assert a deterministic circular-reference error is returned without hanging.

behaviors.description: VLOOKUP exact match returns correct value and missing key returns error.
behaviors.justification: Seam map: module/interface seam (range/table lookup + function semantics + error handling). Failures often occur at lookup-range interpretation and evaluator handoff. INTEGRATION-BRAKE: no real infra needed, no AI/ML, no agentic chain. REJECTION-GATE: System rejected because behavior text does not require OS/network/subprocess effects.
behaviors.test_description: Populate lookup table cells, evaluate VLOOKUP for an existing key and a missing key via engine API, assert returned value and not-found error respectively.

behaviors.description: Nested IF conditions evaluate correctly for high/medium/low branches.
behaviors.justification: Seam map: local function/object seam (conditional expression evaluation recursion). This behavior is primarily formula logic (branching semantics), and can fail inside evaluator logic without requiring module handoff or environment. REJECTION-GATE: Integration rejected because behavior text does not require cross-module state propagation beyond local expression evaluation.
behaviors.test_description: Evaluate nested IF expressions against representative input values (<=10, 11-20, >20) in a single evaluator context and assert each expected branch output.

behaviors.description: CONCATENATE joins values with separator and skips empty cells.
behaviors.justification: Seam map: local function/object seam (string concatenation function semantics). Failure is function-level handling of empties/separators, not infrastructure or multi-module orchestration. REJECTION-GATE: Integration rejected because behavior text targets function output rules, not cross-module interactions.
behaviors.test_description: Call/evaluate CONCATENATE with mixed non-empty and empty operands and assert separator placement excludes empty-cell placeholders.

behaviors.description: Cross-sheet reference `=Sheet2!A1+1` resolves when referenced sheet exists.
behaviors.justification: Seam map: module/interface seam (sheet namespace resolution + evaluator). Failure appears at workbook/sheet lookup boundaries, not just arithmetic logic. INTEGRATION-BRAKE: no real OS/network/subprocess, no AI/ML, no multi-step agentic chain. REJECTION-GATE: System rejected because behavior text only requires internal workbook resolution.
behaviors.test_description: Create workbook with Sheet1 and Sheet2, set Sheet2!A1, evaluate `=Sheet2!A1+1` on Sheet1, and assert correct value.

behaviors.description: On referenced-cell change, dependents recalculate in correct topological order.
behaviors.justification: Seam map: module/interface seam (dependency graph + invalidation + recalculation scheduler). The real failure is orchestration across modules after state change. INTEGRATION-BRAKE: no OS/network/subprocess required, no AI/ML dependency, no multi-agentic sequence. REJECTION-GATE: System rejected because topological recalculation is internal engine behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Build a multi-level dependency chain, mutate an upstream cell, trigger recomputation, and assert downstream values reflect correct topological recomputation results.

behaviors.description: Undo after formula edit restores formula text and previously computed dependent values.
behaviors.justification: Seam map: module/interface seam (edit history/undo manager + recalculation state restoration). Failure requires interaction between history and compute state modules. INTEGRATION-BRAKE: no real OS/network/subprocess, no AI/ML output, no multi-agentic chain. REJECTION-GATE: System rejected because behavior text concerns internal state rollback, not environment I/O.
behaviors.test_description: Edit a formula affecting dependents, capture changed outputs, execute undo, and assert both original formula text and dependent computed values are restored.

behaviors.description: Save workbook to disk and load back with identical formulas/values and no floating-point precision change.
behaviors.justification: Seam map: environment seam (real filesystem I/O) plus serialization/deserialization modules. REAL-INFRA/MOCK-HIDE: in-memory fakes can hide real file-write/read issues (flush/truncation/path/encoding/atomicity assumptions) that appear only on real OS file operations. REJECTION-GATE: Integration rejected because behavior text explicitly requires disk persistence round-trip, which crosses OS filesystem boundary.
behaviors.test_description: Write a workbook containing formulas and high-precision floating-point values to a real temp file, reload from disk via normal load path, and assert exact formula text and expected numeric equality/tolerance invariants.
